Comment.value: Text source item types can be: global baseproject - global title package chapter page page-item tag media attribute list-item alt-text io score io-sprig-story - custom imported
Value list selection can be: All texts - Title - shared texts Current Package - Media subtitles Media alt texts Sprig story - Tags Global texts List texts IO texts Link texts - Imported texts
User select can be either "Title", "Package" or "Filter" depending on which popup menu used for filtering.
Always delete package when selecting Title

Calculation.Text: $user_select = "Package" And FAT Text::gFilterType ≠ "Current Package" And FAT Text::gFilterType ≠ "All texts"

Comment.value: Always delete filter when selecting a new package
Search for all texts in Title
Search for all texts in Title

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ($package_id) And IsEmpty ( $texttype ) Or $texttype = "All texts"

Comment.value: Search for all texts that will be sent to localisation
Search only for texts with a package id
No package selected - show dialog

Calculation.Text: "Select a package if you want to show texts included in this package.¶¶With this filter, texts that are shared between all packages will not be shown."

Comment.value: Search only for texts with a package id
Search for texts without any package id
Search criteria find both "global" and "global baseproject"
Translation view - other Find-criterias
Search for all texts in Title
Search for all texts in Title

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ($package_id) And IsEmpty ( $texttype ) Or $texttype = "All texts"

Comment.value: Search for all texts that will be sent to localisation
Search only for texts with a package id
No package selected - show dialog

Calculation.Text: "Select a package if you want to show texts included in this package.¶¶With this filter, texts that are shared between all packages will not be shown."

Comment.value: Search only for texts with a package id
Search for texts without any package id
Search criteria find both "global" and "global baseproject"

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "mode" ; "Title" ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Text translated::Title id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; FAT Text translated::gPackage ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; FAT Text translated::Localisation code ) & SetProperty ( "shared_localisation" ; Case($texttype = "Title - shared texts"; 1; 0 ))
